name: 辣味鮪魚 Spicy Ahi
desc: 含鮪魚, 黃瓜, 白洋蔥, 毛豆, 辣味美乃滋, 魚卵, 蔥花, 芝麻, 洋蔥酥酥及海苔絲。 Ahi tuna, cucumber, sweet onion, edamame, sriracha aioli, masago, green onion, sesame seeds, onion crisps, shredded nori.

name: 夏威夷鮪魚 Hawaiian Ahi
desc: 含鮪魚,黃瓜,白洋蔥,海帶芽沙拉,毛豆,經典醬汁,辣椒粉,海帶沙拉,蔥花,芝麻及季節脆脆。Ahi tuna, cucumber, sweet onion, wakame seaweed, edamame, Pokeworks classic sauce, chili flakes, seaweed salad, green onion, sesame seeds, seasonal crunch.

name: 柚香果醋鮮蝦 Yuzu Ponzu Shrimp
desc: 含鮮蝦, 黃瓜, 白洋蔥, 鳳梨, 香菜, 和風柚子醋, 海帶沙拉, 蔥花, 芝麻及洋蔥酥酥。 Shrimp, cucumber, sweet onion, pineapple, cilantro, ponzu fresh sauce, seaweed salad, green onion, sesame seeds, onion crisps.

name: 橙香芝麻嫩雞 Sweet Sesame Chicken
desc: 含舒肥嫩雞,黃瓜,白洋蔥,毛豆,橘子,香菜,經典醬汁,海帶沙拉,蔥花,芝麻及餛飩皮脆脆。Chicken breast, cucumber, sweet onion, edamame, mandarin orange, cilantro, Pokeworks classic sauce, seaweed salad, green onion, sesame, wonton crisps.

name: 甜味醬油豆腐 Sweet Shoyu Tofu
desc: 含板豆腐, 黃瓜, 白洋蔥, 羽衣甘藍, 毛豆, 甜味醬油, 蔥花, 海帶芽沙拉及芝麻。 Firm tofu, cucumber, sweet onion, blanched kale, edamame, sweet shoyu sauce, green onion, seaweed salad, sesame seeds.

name: 輕量碗 Light Bowl
desc: 主餐可選1樣: 舒肥嫩雞、鮮蝦、豆腐。黃瓜、白洋蔥、毛豆、海帶沙拉、大蒜脆脆.  Select up to 1 Proteins: Chicken, Shrimp, Tofu. cucumber, sweet onion, edamame, seaweed salad, garlic crisps.

name: POKE YOUR WAY 客製夏威夷丼飯
category: POKE YOUR WAY客製夏威夷拌飯
